CustomField.description: Master-Detail to VS_Session__c: the session this slot was generated within (VS-06). Master-Detail (not Lookup) because a slot is a generated artifact of its session, cascades on session delete/reparent, inherits the session's sharing, and is protected by the session's single §3.4 booking lock (design §2.4, D-019/D-020) -- there is no separate slot-row lock.
CustomField.label: Session
